# Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview

**themepark-ride-controller** is a .NET/C# project. This file will grow as the codebase develops.

## Tech Stack

- **Language/Runtime**: C# / .NET (Visual Studio project structure)
- **License**: MIT

## Build, Test & Run

> _Update these commands once solution/project files are added._

```bash
# Build
dotnet build

# Run tests
dotnet test

# Run a single test class
dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~<TestClassName>"

# Run a single test method
dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~<TestClassName>.<MethodName>"
```

## C# Design Guidelines

When writing any C# code in this repository, the **hexmaster-design-guidelines** MCP rules **must be followed strictly**. This applies to:

- All new C# files and classes
- All edits to existing C# code
- Code reviews and suggestions

Before generating or modifying any C# code, consult the `hexmaster-design-guidelines` MCP server and apply its rules without exception. Do not deviate from these guidelines even when no explicit instruction is given — they are always in effect for C# work in this project.
